name: Cerebrus Pulse
description: Institutional-grade crypto derivatives intelligence. Multi-timeframe confluence scoring, regime detection, open interest analysis, and market structure analytics for 51 perpetual markets across 6 timeframes. Quantitative models with battle-tested analytics.

skills.name: Multi-Timeframe Confluence Analysis
skills.description: Comprehensive technical analysis across 6 timeframes (5m, 15m, 1h, 4h, 1d, 1W) with confluence scoring, trend detection, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, and regime classification for any of 51 perpetual markets.
examples: Analyze BTC confluence across all timeframes
What is ETH's regime and confluence score?
Give me SOL technical analysis

skills.name: Derivatives Market Screener
skills.description: Screen 51 perpetual markets by confluence score, regime, trend strength, volatility, and momentum. Identify strongest bullish or bearish setups across the entire derivatives universe.
examples: Show top 10 strongest bullish setups
Screen for risk-off regime coins
Which coins have the highest confluence scores?

skills.name: Open Interest Analysis
skills.description: Real-time open interest data with delta calculations, percentile ranking, and price-OI divergence detection for perpetual futures.
examples: What is BTC open interest trend?
Show SOL OI divergence analysis
Is ETH OI rising or falling?

skills.name: Spread & Liquidity Analysis
skills.description: Bid-ask spread analysis with slippage estimates at $10k, $50k, $100k, and $500k notional sizes plus liquidity scoring for perpetual markets.
examples: What is the ETH spread and slippage?
Show BTC liquidity depth
Compare spread for SOL vs DOGE

skills.name: Cross-Asset Correlation Analysis
skills.description: BTC-alt correlation matrix with regime classification and sector averages across perpetual markets. Useful for portfolio diversification and risk assessment.
examples: Show correlation matrix for top coins
How correlated is SOL with BTC?
Which coins are least correlated with BTC?

skills.name: Full Intelligence Bundle
skills.description: Complete analytical package combining confluence analysis, open interest, funding rates, spread analysis, and regime detection for a single asset. 17% discount vs individual calls.
examples: Give me the full intelligence bundle for SOL
Complete analysis of BTC
Full report on ETH

skills.name: Chainlink Basis Analysis
skills.description: Compares Hyperliquid perpetual oracle price vs Chainlink aggregated spot price to measure exchange-level premium or discount. Identifies funding pressure, deleveraging events, and mean-reversion signals.
examples: What is the BTC basis between HL and Chainlink?
Is ETH trading at a premium on Hyperliquid?
Show SOL perp premium vs spot

skills.name: CEX-DEX Price Divergence
skills.description: Cross-venue price comparison between Coinbase (CEX) and DEX/Chainlink oracle prices. Detects venue-specific dislocations, arbitrage opportunities, and market stress signals.
examples: Compare ETH price on Coinbase vs DEX
Show CEX-DEX divergence for LINK
Is there a price gap between exchanges for BTC?

skills.name: USDC Collateral Health Monitor
skills.description: Real-time USDC peg status via Chainlink oracle on Arbitrum. Monitors stablecoin deviation from $1.00 peg, Arbitrum sequencer health, and provides risk assessment for USDC-margined positions.
examples: Is USDC currently pegged?
Check USDC collateral health
What is the stablecoin risk level?
